formal_statement: If a peak is broad, do not infer mixed-layering automatically because broadening may arise from size, defects, instrument or preparation.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.chapter_or_appendix: Chapter 3 / Appendix: Modeling One-Dimensional X-Ray Patterns

formal_statement: Defect broadening q(N) can produce more Cauchy/Lorentzian-like line shapes than q(N)=1 models.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.chapter_or_appendix: Chapter 3 / Appendix: Modeling One-Dimensional X-Ray Patterns
